edges.target: function:src/openhuman/subconscious/engine.rs:"Sign in to use the OpenHuman cloud Subconscious provider.".to_string
function:src/openhuman/subconscious/engine.rs:"Sign in or configure a local Subconscious provider in Settings > AI.".to_string

function:src/openhuman/subconscious/engine.rs:"What has the user been working on recently? Any upcoming deadlines, \
                unresolved threads, or notable activity across all sources?".to_string
function:src/openhuman/subconscious/engine.rs:"You are OpenHuman, an AI assistant for productivity and collaboration.".to_string

function:src/openhuman/subconscious/heartbeat/planner/collectors.rs:connections
        .iter()
        .map(|conn| {
            fetch_calendar_events_for_connection(
                executor,
                conn,
                meeting_lookahead_minutes,
                now,
                end_window,
            )
        }).collect

function:src/openhuman/subconscious/heartbeat/planner/store.rs:conn
            .execute(
                "INSERT OR IGNORE INTO heartbeat_notification_state
                 (dedupe_key, event_fingerprint, source, category, stage, sent_at)
                 VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5, ?6)",
                params![
                    marker.dedupe_key,
                    marker.event_fingerprint,
                    marker.source,
                    marker.category,
                    marker.stage,
                    marker.sent_at.to_rfc3339(),
                ],
            ).context
